ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user (project manager) for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the class */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the class was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type (e.g., complexity, coupling, cohesion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the metric type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric type (e.g., lines, points) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the metric */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the metric */,
  "measured_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id")
)
